'''Algae-bread''' was a type of [[Bread/Legends|bread]] made from [[Algae/Legends|algae]].<ref name="LE" /> A slice of algae-bread was used as one of the ingredients in the [[Giju slider]] served at [[Dex's Diner/Legends|Dex's Diner]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="Dex" /> Algae-bread could be served as a [[hors d'oeuvre]] and used as a stuffing where it was paired with roasted [[Rodian Karstag]].<ref name="LE" />
